name: cli_only_test_2026-04-25
outcome_goal: Confirm a real agent response over a strictly cli_llm transport. One job, explicit openai/gpt-5-codex (codex CLI binary verified working in worker after .codex mount made writable). Cursor was the original choice but host has no cursor-agent login, so falling back to codex which IS authenticated.

jobs.label: cli_only_response_test
jobs.prompt: Respond in 2-3 paragraphs to Nate. First, identify yourself by which CLI provider is running you — read your environment (look at the codex binary path, /root/.codex/auth.json keys, your model name) and state plainly which CLI binary and which model you actually are. Then answer this question: 'What's the most surprising thing about the Praxis architecture that an outside engineer wouldn't guess from the code?' Draw on what you can see in /workspace (Code&DBs/Workflow/, .claude/CLAUDE.md, system_authority/, the data dictionary, operator_decisions). Write the full response to /workspace/artifacts/cli_only_test/2026-04-25/agent_response.md (create the directory if needed).
